title: Inventory PM2.5 monitoring and air quality data sources for South Asia
outcome: A dated source inventory separating ground monitors, satellite-derived estimates, low-cost sensors, and unusable sources.
inputs: State of Global Air PM2.5 surfaces
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each listed source for URL, date, access status, measurement method, calibration, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five candidate data sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Map ground monitoring network gaps for India and one other South Asian country
outcome: A reproducible spatial map of existing ground PM2.5 monitors and their coverage gaps at district or equivalent scale, with population within and outside monitoring coverage zones.
expected_artifact: validation.md update with monitoring gap map specification.
validation_method: Replicator confirms station locations against official sources and reproduces gap map with alternative buffer radii.
done_condition: Gap map includes station count, population inside and outside coverage zones, and buffer methodology with replication confirmed.

title: Validate satellite-derived PM2.5 against ground monitors where co-located
outcome: A validation report comparing satellite-derived PM2.5 estimates to ground monitor measurements, with error statistics by region, season, and concentration level.
inputs: State of Global Air PM2.5 surfaces
expected_artifact: validation.md update with satellite-to-ground error statistics.
validation_method: Replicator reruns validation with alternative satellite products and confirms error statistics within reported range.
done_condition: Validation includes RMSE, bias, and correlation by region and season with replication confirmed.

title: Rank monitoring gaps by population, concentration, and uncertainty
outcome: A priority-ranked list of monitoring gaps weighted by population within gap, estimated PM2.5 concentration, and satellite uncertainty.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with gap priority ranking.
validation_method: Replicator reruns ranking with alternative weightings and confirms that top-ranked gaps are robust to reasonable weight changes.
done_condition: Ranking includes explicit weighting methodology, sensitivity to weight changes, and statement that ranking is for discussion not deployment with replication confirmed.

title: Red-team over-precise exposure estimates and regulatory misuse
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying where gap maps and exposure estimates could be misinterpreted as precise measurements or justify regulatory rollback.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every high-risk failure mode has a mitigation or blocks publication, then a second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every exposure or gap claim is either qualified with satellite-uncertainty caveats, softened to analytic language, or gated behind replication.

title: Check whether outputs match pollution control board decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether monitoring gap maps would change any real monitoring-network deployment decision responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk for the output, then a second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: The output has a named user, named decision, explicit caveats about regulatory vs. informational monitoring, and replicated field-reality review before publication.
